extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The signal begins with a moderate value and quickly makes one or more sharp peaks above 0.7, followed by a noticeable drop below 0.3 within the first quarter of the series.  
R2: After the early peak–drop, the middle part of the series (roughly the central half) oscillates around a medium level (about 0.3–0.6) without staying flat for long; it shows several short up‑and‑down swings.  
R3: In the last quarter of the series there is at least one additional local peak above 0.6, but the series does not end in a prolonged low segment (it finishes again around medium values, not near 0).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The signal begins at a relatively high level (around or above 0.6) and then drops steeply toward a low region (below about 0.3) early in the series.  
R2: After this first steep decline, the middle portion contains one broad “hill”: the values rise gradually from low to a single main peak (around or above 0.7) and then fall again, without many rapid oscillations.  
R3: Toward the end, the signal climbs from a pronounced low (near 0.1–0.2) back to a moderate level (around 0.3–0.5) and settles there without forming another very high peak.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Has multiple moderate peaks and troughs, but no single dominant spike (all peaks are of similar height).
R2: Overall variability is moderate, with values staying in a mid-range (roughly between 0.1 and 0.8) without long flat segments.
R3: Does not exhibit a sustained sharp drop from a high value to a very low value followed by a single strong recovery peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts at a relatively high value and quickly drops to a low value, forming an early sharp downward slope.
R2: Contains a single dominant peak in the middle of the series that is clearly higher than nearby points.
R3: After the middle peak, there is another pronounced drop to a low value, followed by a moderate recovery toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series has several medium-height peaks and dips spread across the full time range, without one single dominant tall peak early on.  
R2: After the middle of the series, values repeatedly rise and fall, but mostly stay within a mid-range (roughly between 0.2 and 0.7) rather than dropping very close to zero.  
R3: The lowest points are not extremely low (they rarely go near the very bottom of the scale).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts with a strong high peak very early, followed by a steep drop.  
R2: Somewhere after the midpoint, there is a pronounced deep valley, where the value briefly goes close to the bottom of the scale.  
R3: Between the early peak and the late deep valley, the values fluctuate around a mid-level plateau, without rapid high–low oscillations.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series begins with a moderate value and quickly rises to a distinct early peak, followed by a sharp drop.  
R2: The middle section (roughly one‑third to two‑thirds of the timeline) stays mostly in a mid‑range band without strong upward or downward trends.  
R3: In the last third, the series shows one or more relatively sharp upward spikes starting from lower values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a high value and shows a strong, mostly continuous decline over the first part of the timeline.  
R2: After this early decline, the middle section fluctuates gently around a mid‑range level without returning to the initial high.  
R3: Near the end, any peaks remain lower than the initial starting value and are followed by noticeable drops.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Contains multiple pronounced oscillations (at least three clear peaks and three clear valleys) across the whole series.  
R2: Has at least one deep drop where the value falls below 0.2 and then rises again above 0.5 later in the series.  
R3: Does not maintain a long, nearly flat plateau; local segments are mostly sloped or wavy rather than steady.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts with a high value (above 0.6) that quickly decreases into a low valley (below 0.3) within the first quarter of the series.  
R2: Contains a relatively stable mid-level plateau (around 0.4–0.5) for a noticeable duration in the middle part of the series.  
R3: After the middle plateau, shows one main peak followed by an overall downward trend toward the end, without strong oscillations.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The first major peak (global maximum) happens very early, within the first 10–15% of the time axis.  
R2: After this early peak, the signal tends to stay in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without long, smooth downward drifts to the minimum.  
R3: The deepest troughs (values near the minimum of the series) occur later in the series, after roughly 40% of the time axis.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The first major peak (global maximum) occurs after the start but clearly not at the very beginning, typically around 15–35% of the time axis.  
R2: After reaching this peak, the signal exhibits a long, relatively smooth downward drift from high values (around 0.7) to near-minimum values (around 0.1–0.2).  
R3: The lowest troughs appear directly after this long descent and are followed by a partial recovery toward mid-range values (around 0.3–0.5).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts with a moderate value and then shows an early sharp spike to a high peak, followed by a quick drop.
R2: In the middle portion, the values fluctuate with several medium peaks and troughs, without any long flat plateau.
R3: There is no single very deep valley near the end; instead, the tail continues with moderate oscillations around the mid-range.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a high value and then steadily decreases into a clear deep minimum early in the sequence.
R2: After this early valley, it rises to form one dominant central peak that stands out above surrounding values.
R3: Near the end, the series again drops to a pronounced low point before finishing with a short, relatively flat segment at a mid-to-low level.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts with a moderate value and quickly shows a sharp peak near the beginning (within the first 10–15% of time), followed by a rapid drop.  
R2: After this early peak, the mid-section (roughly 20–60% of time) is relatively flat or slowly varying around a mid-range level (about 0.3–0.6) without very steep prolonged rises or drops.  
R3: Towards the end, the series shows one or more moderate oscillations but no very tall, isolated spike that clearly exceeds earlier peaks.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a relatively high value and exhibits its tallest peak very early (within the first 10–20% of time), then drops steeply to a much lower level.  
R2: The middle part shows a clear “valley then hill” pattern: it first stays low, then rises again to a second large peak that is comparable to the first peak.  
R3: After this second peak, there is a prolonged descending phase into a noticeable deep trough near the late-middle region, followed by only smaller, shorter fluctuations toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: At the beginning (first 10% of time), the value quickly rises to a high peak above 0.8 and then drops sharply.
R2: In the middle segment (about 20–50% of time), the values stay mostly in a moderate band around 0.3–0.6 without very low dips (rarely below 0.2).
R3: In the late segment (after ~50% of time), the series shows a large spike from a low value (~0.1–0.2) up to above 0.6, then oscillates moderately.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: At the beginning (first 10–15% of time), the value starts high (around 0.6–0.7), reaches a peak above 0.7, then steadily decreases down to around 0.2.
R2: In the middle segment (about 20–50% of time), there is a broad “hill” where the values gradually increase from low (~0.2) to moderate/high (~0.6–0.7) without sharp spikes.
R3: Around the transition from middle to late segment (~50–60% of time), the series drops to a pronounced low dip near 0.1 before recovering to moderate values (~0.3–0.5).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series shows an early sharp peak (value above 0.8) within the first 10 time steps, followed by a fast drop below 0.3.  
R2: In the middle segment (roughly time 15–40) the values stay in a moderate band (about 0.3–0.6) without very deep troughs below 0.15.  
R3: Later in the series (after time 40) there are one or more tall spikes above 0.65 separated by relatively shallow dips (no extended region below 0.15).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (above 0.6) and then decreases steadily into a clear trough (below 0.25) within the first 15 time steps.  
R2: After this initial trough, the mid-section (about time 15–45) rises smoothly to a single dominant peak around 0.7–0.8 and then falls back without multiple tall spikes.  
R3: In the final segment (after time 45) the amplitude is reduced: values fluctuate in a narrower, mid-range band (about 0.3–0.5) without returning to very high peaks above 0.6.
